name: web2dkit
description: Game-development Skills and MCP tools for designing, building, playtesting, debugging, and polishing browser-native 2D games with coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Design, build, and verify browser-native 2D games
interface.longDescription: Guide coding agents from a focused 2D game contract through implementation, visual polish, deterministic gameplay scenarios, domain assertions, and repeatable quality checks.
defaultPrompt: Turn this idea into a focused Web 2D game contract and first playable slice.
Build and verify the next complete player loop in this Web 2D game.
Playtest this game with deterministic state assertions and a separate visual review.
